Sexually Transmitted Infections Treatment Guidelines, 2021

Men Who Have Sex with Men (MSM) 
Print 
Minus 
Related Pages 
MSM comprise a diverse group in terms of behaviors, identities, and health care needs ( 179 ). The term “MSM ” often is used clinically to refer to sexual behavior alone, regardless of sexual orientation (e.g., a person might identify as heterosexual but still be classified as MSM). Sexual orientation is independent of gender identity. Classification of MSM can vary in the inclusion of transgender men and women on the basis of whether men are defined by sex at birth (i.e., transgender women included) or current gender identity (i.e., transgender men included).
